name: Study Planner
description: Turn a pile of exams and deadlines into a realistic, day-by-day study schedule that uses spaced repetition and adapts when life gets in the way. No more 2 AM cram sessions.
author: ProwlrBot Team

before_after.before: Three exams next week, no plan, panic-studying everything the night before and barely passing
before_after.after: A clear daily schedule that spaces out study sessions across the week, with built-in breaks, so you walk into exams prepared and rested

user_stories.quote: I went from a 2.8 GPA to a 3.4 in one semester just because I actually had a plan instead of winging it every week.
user_stories.name: Aisha J.

user_stories.quote: My son has ADHD and this breaks his studying into small enough chunks that he can actually get through them. Game changer for us.
user_stories.name: Tom W.

user_stories.quote: The spaced repetition scheduling is legit. I actually remember material on exam day instead of forgetting it overnight.
user_stories.name: Marcus L.

setup_steps.instruction: Add your upcoming exams and assignment due dates (type them in or connect Google Classroom).
Tell the planner your available study hours per day and preferred time blocks.
Choose a study style: short Pomodoro bursts (25 min), longer focused sessions (1 hr), or a mix.
Connect your calendar so the plan syncs with your existing schedule and avoids conflicts.
